<a id="survey-review-automation"></a>
# 📝 Survey / Review Automation

> Systems designed to produce structured surveys, reviews, or systematic review-style outputs.

## What belongs here

- the main output is a review-like artifact

## Exclude if

- it mainly retrieves papers or supports literature exploration without producing a formal review
